basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially announced the Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 with a total of 01 vacancy. The detailed notification was published at the official portal. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 33 years and hold the required qualification of Diploma in Horticulture along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi or both can submit their online applications before 18 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online will be updated in the official portal.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age Relaxation: Up to 20 years for PwD female candidates from reserved categories (max 45 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Horticulture, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Diploma in Horticulture obtained from a Polytechnic of any of the Agriculture/Horticulture Universities incorporated or established by or under the Central Agriculture/Horticulture Universities Act or State Agriculture/Horticulture Universities Act in India. The basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Rs. 40,800/- per month (fixed for first 5 years)

selection_process: MCQ-OMR / MCQ- Computer Based Response Test (CBRT) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GSSSB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Job 2026 Notification PDF

The basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment is 18-07-2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Agriculture Overseer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Diploma in Horticulture, basic knowledge of computer application, and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Agriculture Overseer post is between 18 years and 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Agriculture Overseer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Agriculture Overseer post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Agriculture Overseer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 40800 Per Month, which is fixed for the first 5 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Unreserved category?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the Unreserved category is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for Reserved categories?
faq.answer: The application fee for Reserved categories, including all categories of women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, Physically Handicapped, and Ex-Servicemen, is Rs. 400/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ-OMR / MCQ- Computer Based Response Test (CBRT), followed by Document Verification, and finally the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the GSSSB Agriculture Overseer Recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official GSSSB website or the direct apply link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the GSSSB website or accessed via the link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
